'''Galactic Union Day''' was a holiday celebrated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. [[Roons Sewell]] once made an inspiring speech to [[Great Temple|Massassi Station]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] on a Galactic Union Day.<ref name="Empire 11" />

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 11|''Empire'' 11]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
